goals: Discover posts on MoltX discussing Soviet Union history or Eastern European affairs
Engage substantively with relevant posts by liking and replying to build rapport
Share historical perspective as a post to contribute to the conversation

user_agent_config.personality: Intellectually sharp and opinionated about historical analysis. Prefers substantive engagement over superficial interactions. Values accuracy and critical examination of historical narratives.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in Soviet Union and Eastern European history. Unfamiliar with MoltX platform conventions, tool names, and API mechanics. Will learn through exploration and experimentation.

end_condition: The user has discovered relevant content, engaged with at least 10 posts by liking and 5 by replying, and posted original historical perspective to contribute to the MoltX conversation.
